## X-Sense Home Security v1.4.10.2

### 🎥 Cameras
- Restores camera discovery during Home Assistant startup so camera entities can be created before the camera platform is set up.
- Keeps live camera stream handling unchanged.

### 🎞️ Recordings
- Keeps the X-Sense Recordings sidebar, playback routes, recording services, and background media sync limited to accounts that actually have X-Sense cameras.
- Cleans up the recordings runtime when no loaded X-Sense camera entries remain.
